# Brawldly — AI Search Index

Brawldly (https://brawldly.com) is a fan-made Brawl Stars daily puzzle site.

## Game URLs

- https://brawldly.com/classic — Brawl Stars Wordle: guess the daily brawler from stat clues (rarity, class, speed, range, release year, hypercharge)
- https://brawldly.com/pixel — Pixel Brawler: guess the brawler from a pixelated portrait that reveals with each wrong guess
- https://brawldly.com/gadget — Guess the Gadget: identify which brawler owns the shown gadget ability
- https://brawldly.com/hypercharge — Hypercharge: identify which brawler owns the shown hypercharge ability
- https://brawldly.com/ultimate-challenge — Ultimate Challenge: all 4 modes combined, one brawler, 25 attempts, endless mode

## Info pages

- https://brawldly.com/about-us
- https://brawldly.com/privacy-policy
- https://brawldly.com/terms-of-service
